\tzpentry{ID4704}{Vector Potential Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4704 introduces Vector Potential Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\\mathbf{A}(r,\\theta,\\phi,t) = \\sum_{nlm} \\mathbf{A}_{nlm} \\, j_n(k_{nl}^B r) \\, \\mathbf{Y}_l^m(\\theta,\\phi) \\, e^{-i\\Omega_{nl}t}\n\\end{equation}
